query: SELECT us.id, us.userId, us.tierId, st.name, st.displayName, st.maxVehicles FROM userSubscriptions us INNER JOIN subscriptionTiers st ON us.tierId = st.id WHERE us.userId = 2730024; SELECT COUNT(*) as vehicleCount FROM vehicles WHERE userId = 2730024;
